meaning: 1. to flow back; 2. reflux; 3. circumfluence; 4. refluence; 5. backwar
sentence: 很多海外华人选择回流到家乡发展。
pinyin: Hěn duō hǎiwài Huárén xuǎnzé huíliú dào jiāxiāng fāzhǎn.
english: Many overseas Chinese choose to return home to develop their careers.

sentence: 这台电脑的记忆体不够用，需要升级。
pinyin: Zhè tái diànnǎo de jìyìtǐ bù gòu yòng, xūyào shēngjí.
english: This computer doesn't have enough memory and needs an upgrade.

sentence: 他去年正式皈依佛教。
pinyin: Tā qùnián zhèngshì guīyī Fójiào.
english: He officially converted to Buddhism last year.

meaning: 1. prominent; 2. eminent; 3. important person; 4. notable; 5. dignitar
sentence: 那场晚宴来了不少社会显要。
pinyin: Nà chǎng wǎnyàn lái le bù shǎo shèhuì xiǎnyào.
english: Many prominent figures attended that dinner banquet.

sentence: 集体主义强调团队的利益高于个人。
pinyin: Jítǐ zhǔyì qiángdiào tuánduì de lìyì gāoyú gèrén.
english: Collectivism emphasizes that the team's interests come before the individual's.

sentence: 弟弟总是仿效哥哥的一举一动。
pinyin: Dìdi zǒngshì fǎngxiào gēge de yī jǔ yī dòng.
english: The younger brother always imitates everything his older brother does.

sentence: 这条路正在加宽，施工要两个月。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lù zhèngzài jiākuān, shīgōng yào liǎng gè yuè.
english: This road is being widened and the construction will take two months.

meaning: 1. special glory; 2. distinction; 3. rare honor; 4. one's laurels
sentence: 获得这个奖是莫大的殊荣。
pinyin: Huòdé zhège jiǎng shì mòdà de shūróng.
english: Receiving this award is a tremendous honor.

sentence: 居民们去市政府陈情，要求改善交通。
pinyin: Jūmínmen qù shì zhèngfǔ chénqíng, yāoqiú gǎishàn jiāotōng.
english: Residents went to petition the city government to improve transportation.

sentence: 那位乐师在音乐会上演奏了一曲古筝。
pinyin: Nà wèi yuèshī zài yīnyuèhuì shàng yǎnzòu le yī qǔ gǔzhēng.
english: That musician performed a guzheng piece at the concert.

sentence: 编者在前言中说明了这本书的目的。
pinyin: Biānzhě zài qiányán zhōng shuōmíng le zhè běn shū de mùdì.
english: The editor explained the purpose of the book in the preface.

sentence: 他花了十年时间完成这部三部曲小说。
pinyin: Tā huā le shí nián shíjiān wánchéng zhè bù sānbùqǔ xiǎoshuō.
english: He spent ten years completing this trilogy of novels.

sentence: 东方明珠是上海最著名的地标之一。
pinyin: Dōngfāng Míngzhū shì Shànghǎi zuì zhùmíng de dìbiāo zhī yī.
english: The Oriental Pearl Tower is one of Shanghai's most famous landmarks.

meaning: to administer; to manage; to hold in trust or escrow
sentence: 他出差期间，房子由邻居代管。
pinyin: Tā chūchāi qījiān, fángzi yóu línjū dài guǎn.
english: While he was away on a business trip, the neighbor looked after his house.

sentence: 这个唱段是京剧里最经典的片段之一。
pinyin: Zhège chàng duàn shì jīngjù lǐ zuì jīngdiǎn de piànduàn zhī yī.
english: This aria is one of the most classic passages in Peking opera.

sentence: 销售团队这个月超额完成了任务。
pinyin: Xiāoshòu tuánduì zhège yuè chāo é wánchéng le rènwù.
english: The sales team exceeded their quota this month.

meaning: the shadow of a human figure; a trace of a person's presence (usu. com
sentence: 深夜的街上一个人影都没有。
pinyin: Shēnyè de jiē shàng yīgè rén yǐng dōu méiyǒu.
english: There wasn't a soul on the street late at night.

meaning: to destroy one's (reputation etc); (of a device etc) to self-destruct
sentence: 他因为一时冲动，做出了自毁前程的决定。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi yīshí chōngdòng, zuòchū le zì huǐ qiánchéng de juédìng.
english: Acting on impulse, he made a decision that destroyed his own future prospects.

meaning: photo taken during a theatrical production; a still (from a movie)
sentence: 她把最喜欢的剧照打印出来贴在墙上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zuì xǐhuān de jù zhào dǎyìn chūlái tiē zài qiáng shàng.
english: She printed out her favorite still from the show and put it on the wall.

sentence: 爷爷退休后在院子里种菜，每天都很开心。
pinyin: Yéye tuìxiū hòu zài yuànzi lǐ zhòng cài, měitiān dōu hěn kāixīn.
english: After retiring, grandpa grows vegetables in the yard and is happy every day.

sentence: 我的相机记忆卡满了，要先删几张照片。
pinyin: Wǒ de xiàngjī jì yì kǎ mǎn le, yào xiān shān jǐ zhāng zhàopiàn.
english: My camera's memory card is full; I need to delete some photos first.

meaning: (of facts or truth) to become fully revealed; to come to light; (old)
sentence: 事情的真相终于大白于天下。
pinyin: Shìqíng de zhēnxiàng zhōngyú dà bái yú tiānxià.
english: The truth of the matter finally came to light for everyone to see.

meaning: to make modifications to a product's model or design
sentence: 这款手机今年改款后，外观更简洁了。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī jīnnián gǎi kuǎn hòu, wàiguān gèng jiǎnjié le.
english: After this phone's redesign this year, its appearance became much cleaner.

sentence: 签合同前最好先了解一下合同法的基本规定。
pinyin: Qiān hétong qián zuìhǎo xiān liǎojiě yīxià hé tóng fǎ de jīběn guīdìng.
english: Before signing a contract, it's best to first understand the basic provisions of contract law.

sentence: 疫情期间，很多国家关闭了国门。
pinyin: Yìqíng qījiān, hěnduō guójiā guānbì le guó mén.
english: During the pandemic, many countries closed their borders.

sentence: 路边那栋在建的大楼预计明年完工。
pinyin: Lù biān nà dòng zài jiàn de dàlóu yùjì míngnián wángōng.
english: The building under construction by the road is expected to be completed next year.

sentence: 检察院决定对他提起公诉。
pinyin: Jiǎncháyuàn juédìng duì tā tíqǐ gōng sù.
english: The procuratorate decided to bring criminal prosecution against him.

sentence: 这家基金专门做科技领域的创业投资。
pinyin: Zhè jiā jījīn zhuānmén zuò kējì lǐngyù de chuàng yè tóu zī.
english: This fund specializes in venture capital investment in the technology sector.

meaning: road show or promotional tour (for a product etc)
sentence: 公司上市前在全国各地做了路演。
pinyin: Gōngsī shàngshì qián zài quánguó gèdì zuò le lù yǎn.
english: Before going public, the company held road shows across the country.

sentence: 这首诗里有几句广为流传的名句。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu shī lǐ yǒu jǐ jù guǎngwéi liúchuán de míng jù.
english: This poem contains several widely circulated famous lines.

sentence: 买完车险后，记得把保险单存好。
pinyin: Mǎi wán chēxiǎn hòu, jìde bǎ bǎo xiǎn dān cún hǎo.
english: After buying car insurance, remember to keep the insurance policy in a safe place.

sentence: 他在一家知名影业公司担任导演。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā zhīmíng yǐng yè gōngsī dānrèn dǎoyǎn.
english: He works as a director at a well-known film industry company.

sentence: 教育兴国、科技立国是国家的基本方针。
pinyin: Jiàoyù xīng guó, kējì lì guó shì guójiā de jīběn fāngzhēn.
english: Building the nation through education and founding it on science and technology are the country's basic principles.

sentence: 两家公司决定合股成立一家新企业。
pinyin: Liǎng jiā gōngsī juédìng hé gǔ chénglì yī jiā xīn qǐyè.
english: The two companies decided to pool their shares and set up a new enterprise.

meaning: to inflict (punishment); to provide (training etc); to apply (pressure
sentence: 老师对犯错的学生施以适当的惩戒。
pinyin: Lǎoshī duì fàncuò de xuésheng shī yǐ shìdàng de chéngjiè.
english: The teacher imposed appropriate discipline on the student who made a mistake.

meaning: to gather (people); to collect (talent); to come to an end
sentence: 他花了好几年时间收罗各地的古钱币。
pinyin: Tā huā le hǎo jǐ nián shíjiān shōu luó gèdì de gǔ qiánbì.
english: He spent several years collecting ancient coins from various places.

sentence: 他今天情绪反常，一句话都不说。
pinyin: Tā jīntiān qíngxù fǎncháng, yī jù huà dōu bù shuō.
english: He was unusually quiet today and didn't say a word.

sentence: 压力大会让人更快衰老。
pinyin: Yālì dà huì ràng rén gèng kuài shuāilǎo.
english: High stress can make a person age faster.

sentence: 这家公司资金雄厚，发展很快。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zījīn xiónghòu, fāzhǎn hěn kuài.
english: This company has substantial funding and is growing quickly.

sentence: 环保已经成为一种新的社会风尚。
pinyin: Huánbǎo yǐjīng chéngwéi yī zhǒng xīn de shèhuì fēngshàng.
english: Environmental protection has become a new social trend.

meaning: 1. to warm oneself (by a fire etc)
sentence: 冬天大家围着炉子取暖。
pinyin: Dōngtiān dàjiā wéi zhe lúzi qǔnuǎn.
english: In winter everyone gathers around the stove to keep warm.

sentence: 相比之下，这家餐厅的价格更合理。
pinyin: Xiāngbǐ zhīxià, zhè jiā cāntīng de jiàgé gèng hélǐ.
english: By comparison, this restaurant's prices are more reasonable.

sentence: 学校设有医务室，同学生病可以去看诊。
pinyin: Xuéxiào shè yǒu yīwù shì, tóngxué shēngbìng kěyǐ qù kànzhěn.
english: The school has a medical room where students can go see a doctor when they're sick.

sentence: 这件毛衣的质地很柔软，穿上很舒服。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn máoyī de zhì dì hěn róuruǎn, chuān shàng hěn shūfu.
english: This sweater has a very soft texture and is comfortable to wear.

meaning: 1. to take up one's post; 2. to be given a job
sentence: 新员工下周一正式上岗。
pinyin: Xīn yuángōng xià zhōuyī zhèngshì shàng gǎng.
english: The new employee officially starts work next Monday.

meaning: 1. a torment; 2. a trial; 3. tribulation; 4. a cross (to bear); 5. wel
sentence: 经历了那么多磨难，他依然乐观。
pinyin: Jīnglìle nàme duō mónàn, tā yīrán lèguān.
english: Despite going through so many hardships, he remains optimistic.

meaning: 1. to solicit contributions; 2. to collect donations
sentence: 同学们在校门口募捐，帮助贫困地区的孩子。
pinyin: Tóngxuémen zài xiào ménkǒu mùjuān, bāngzhù pínkùn dìqū de háizi.
english: Students collected donations at the school gate to help children in impoverished areas.

sentence: 他收到了大学的录取通知书。
pinyin: Tā shōudào le dàxué de lùqǔ tōngzhīshū.
english: He received the university's admission notice.

meaning: one's two hands; two prongs (of a strategy); both aspects, eventualiti
sentence: 他两手提着沉重的购物袋。
pinyin: Tā liǎng shǒu tí zhe chén zhòng de gòu wù dài.
english: He was carrying heavy shopping bags in both hands.

meaning: (formal, honorific) your writing; your handwriting; pen; calligraphy b
sentence: 他花了大笔钱买了一辆新车。
pinyin: Tā huā le dà bǐ qián mǎi le yī liàng xīn chē.
english: He spent a large sum of money to buy a new car.
